title: Coordinator service: assignment, collection, verification orchestration, public hash-chained ledger
context: bigger-pi is an open, distributed, verification-first effort to compute more digits of pi on donated compute; the public good is the open, reproducible, independently-verified toolchain, chunk-coordination protocol, and provenance ledger. The coordinator assigns work, collects results, orchestrates the second-worker recompute, and records the public hash-chained ledger; critically it never executes donor-supplied code - only our defined work units. It depends on ledger-005 and verify-009.
objective: Build the coordinator service handling work-unit assignment, result collection, verification orchestration, and the public append-only hash-chained ledger.
acceptanceCriteria: Assigns work units (no duplicate assignment beyond the required verification copy), collects results + checksums, dispatches the 2nd-worker recompute, and records assign->result->verify->merge in the public, append-only, hash-chained ledger.
The coordinator never executes donor-supplied code; it only dispatches our defined work units.
The published ledger is reproducible: an independent party can re-derive the run's final hash.
output: A PR adding the coordinator service with assignment, collection, verification orchestration, and a public hash-chained ledger.
